summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. #72092 is routed to central security handling per deterministic validation. actions.reason: Route exact PR #72092 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not merge, close, comment on, or repair it through this ProjectClownfish plan.

Active author follow-up and failing checks block merge; the Discord message-delivery surface is too risky to repair or replace without refreshed author/maintainer direction.
This PR appears independently plausible, but it cannot be recommended for merge in this plan-only result without refreshed mergeability plus complete Codex /review and merge_preflight proof.
